node.statement: FIB-BINARY-001: After choosing the sourced orthogonal binary fusion-tree basis (left-associated per [P1.6(i)] from external `Penneys binary fusion-tree basis and Fibonacci distinct-simple relation` = `references/text/PenneysUnitaryFusionCategories.md:532, :610, :623-625`), the coordinate matrix for η: Q → Q⊗Q with coefficients x,y,p,q,r is isometric iff star(x)x + star(y)y = 1 and star(p)p + star(q)q + star(r)r = 1. This formalises the coordinate part of `summary.tex` THM-9.4.1 ≡ `summary.tex` §7.3 binary refinement; the categorical basis choice is recorded as an external assumption (CAD external `6e701135c915e3a7.json`; SHA256 preserved in this repo's `PROVENANCE.md` after P7.2c executes).
